zone_name: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

12.name: Base of the Tree
12.description: A rather large tree stands here, dwarfing the gazebo, and making you look like an ant in comparison. The branches reach far out over the city, and as you look up into them, you can see a myriad of activity. The trunk seems to have cracks in the bark just large enough to get your feet into.

s.to_zone: Mareldjan Park - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

43.name: Base of the Tree
43.description: Above you towers a giant tree. The tree rises majesticly into the heavens, becoming lost among the clouds. You see some small activity about 200' above you, however you cant quite make out what it is that is moving. The trunk of the tree does seem to be covered in a very slimy, well...slug trail. A word of caution: it's a VERY large slug trail.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

42.name: Up the Tree
42.description: As you climb up the tree, you notice that its awfully hard to get back down. Being smart, or a fraction thereof, you decide that up is the only way to go without falling.

d.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

33.name: Spider Monkey Commons
33.description: Giant webs fill this dark area, obscuring all light and casting you into gloom. This appears to be the main living area for these oddball creatures. There are literally thousands of webs here.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

34.name: Spider Monkey Bend
34.description: The darkening and gloomy branch bends to the east and south here. The branch looks unhealthy and if gnarls could look evil, you imagine that they would look just like the ones you are currently walking on. There is a chittering sound about you.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

35.name: Spider Monkey Way
35.description: The foliage begins to lighten here, however it seems to be a bit dark and gloomy in this area of the tree. As you make your way about the branch, you find yourself running into spider webs and threads. Constantly brushing at your face and body, you attempt not to leap out of your skin every time you run into a thread as thick as a piece of string.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

36.name: Monkey Switch
36.description: This is a large T intersection with directions continuing to the north, south, and west. Along the northern branch, the foliage seems to thin out a bit. To the south, you hear the odd sounds of howling, or is that hooting? The smell of bananas wafts to you from the west.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

37.name: Monkeyshine Way
37.description: The branch seems to flatten out here, and the bark is completely worn away. You are in a virtual tunnel of leaves, and the sounds of monkey chatter is all around you. The branch continues either east or west.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

38.name: Monkeyshine Way
38.description: Being careful you don't step in any monkey droppings, you make your way along the branch. The branch seems to be a little worn from all of the traffic. You smell bananas here.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

39.name: Monkey Bend
39.description: There is a large bend in the branch here as well as several smaller ones. The smaller avenues look a little unsafe, considering that as you look over the edge of this huge arboreal highway, you find yourself about 200 feet off the ground. Falling could hurt.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

40.name: Along the branch
40.description: This branch reaches from the west and makes a gradual bend toward the north. Oddly enough, you hear the noises of monkeys coming from the north. As you listen carefully, it almost sounds as if they are making fun of you! Then again, who wouldn't?

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

41.name: Large branch
41.description: Pulling yourself up on top of the huge branch, you notice that it looks like a virtual road. Huge seems to be the operative word in these parts. Not only do the branches look like the could carry wagons of dragon excrement, but leaves are the size of doors, and termite holes are about as large as a guard dog. The branch disappears into the thick foliage toward the east.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

d.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

45.name: Large branch
45.description: Pulling yourself up on top of the huge branch, you notice that it looks like a virtual road. Huge seems to be the operative word in these parts. Not only do the branches look like the could carry wagons of dragon excrement, but dog. The branch disappears into the thick foliage toward the east.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

d.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

47.name: Banana Branch
47.description: The smell of bananas are overwhelming here! They seem to be everywhere, as if this was a large fruiting banana tree. You were certain it was an oak when last you looked...

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

48.name: Monkeyshine Way
48.description: The branch seems to flatten out here, and the bark is completely worn away. around you. The branch continues either east or west.

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

go thread.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

1907.name: Spider Monkey Swing
1907.description: This is a rather odd place to end the branch, isn't it? The twisted and gnarled branch seems to have lost the rest of itself to some unknown force. It looks as if it was bitten clean off right at your feet. There are many spider monkey threads hanging down from above, however the webs seem to thin out a bit here.

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

go thread.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

1909.name: Along the Gibbon Branch
1909.description: The howlings are getting louder as you continue on this branch. The tunnel of leaves gets less and less dense to the south and actually opens up to become a large canopy. You notice the east is rather quiet and a small breeze blows at you from that direction.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

1910.name: Gibbon Swing
1910.description: The branch ends abruptly here and looks like it has been broken off. Looking over the edge, you see the roof tops of the city. Before you dangles a small vine.

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

1911.name: Gibbon End
1911.description: The large branch begins to twist and turn, as if a titan had used it to pick it's teeth and had deformed it in the process. You can hear the howls and hoots of creatures to the south, however, large leaves bar your way.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

1912.name: Gibbon Community Entrance
1912.description: This appears to be the Gibbon community entrance. There are several huge leaves to the north, while the large canopy continues to the east. The noise here is horrific! All around you Gibbons play and work while howling at the tops of their lungs. There are several Gibbon nests here.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

1914.name: Gibbon Community Center
1914.description: This area is one huge platform made of of millions of interwoven branches. It seems to be very old, as many of the branches have grown together to form a virtual web of living floor. The ceiling of leaves rises above you ten to twenty feet. What is most impressive is a huge statue of a Gibbon made directly from the interwoven branches.

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3328.name: Fungus Groves
3328.description: The dust is so thick here, that it is horribly hot and hard to breathe! The thick air has you realing in confusion! Looking about you, you see the millions of mushrooms and fungi you have disturbed! This isn't dust; it is a huge cloud of spores! I think it might be best to leave! You feel somewhat dizzy and confused.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3329.name: Spore Roost
3329.description: The branch ends here, canopied by hundreds of large mushrooms. These do not seem to produce the clouds of spores their cousins to the north make. The branch seems to be a little less rotten here and it looks like a good place to catch your breath before heading off into the other areas.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

49.name: Ant Landing
49.description: This branch looks like it has been chewed apart by millions of little mouths. It ends abruptly as it begins a gentle twist to the east. You see several spider threads hanging here.

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

go thread.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

go into.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

52.name: Ant Hollow
52.description: This small opening is rather cramped and you find yourself squeezing past the rough walls with a tinge of claustrophobia. There are several small holes to the east here, while to the west, a larger opening beckons you. It is very dry here. (0)

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

go into.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

53.name: Ant Colony Way
53.description: The passage is a bit larger here and the walls seem to have a slight velvety feeling to them. Small ants track to and fro and their movements make small shuffling noises. The passage continues to the south and a smaller passage leads off to the east. It is very dry here. (0)

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

55.name: Ant Commune
55.description: This appears to be the major housing area for the ant colony. Here and there are smaller tunnels which lead off into the tree, most of which are much to small for you to enter. There is a major tunnel to the south and north, however. It is very dry here. (0)

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

56.name: Ant Barracks
56.description: This barren room houses the ant guards of the colony. Again, there are many smaller tunnels running into the tree from here, but only two are large enough to admit your entrance. The room seems rather stuffy, and the heat seems to be rising. You hear a soft chittering coming from the east. It is very dry here. (0)

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

57.name: Hatchery
57.description: The room seems to vibrate with a rhythmic pulse as you enter. The soft humming of ant legs is all about you, as millions of tiny ants mill about your feet. The room is perfectly smooth and a light golden brown. A soft breeze of sole purpose in life is to bring new hatchlings into the world. It would be a bad idea to have a picnic in here, by the way. It is very dry here. (0)

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

58.name: Mossy Branch
58.description: The branch you find yourself on is slick and mossy. One wrong step, and you'll find yourself speeding headlong into the hard streets of our fair city. The branch continues to the south.

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3319.name: Toucan Switch
3319.description: This intersection has branches continuing to the north, east, and south. There are all sorts of rare tropical birds flitting about, here and there, half hidden by the mist and foliage. Large toucans nod and screech at your trespass, however it's the large vines that seem to give you an odd feeling. Do they move?

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Toucan
npcs.description: The toucan you are looking at looks right back at you.  The toucan is a rare, long-beaked, tropical bird.  They are large and could snap your fingers off in one shot; and would if you gave them a chance.

3320.name: Toucan Nests
3320.description: The thick mist clouds your vision, but you can just make out perfectly tailored toucan nests. Just out of harms way, you can see that they are made each one of the fifty or so here. The Bungchu and Jujin vines, with their musky odor, try to grasp a strangle hold on the tree. The strange sounds of this odd jungle are all about you.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Toucan
npcs.description: The toucan you are looking at looks right back at you.  The toucan is a rare, long-beaked, tropical bird.  They are large and could snap your fingers off in one shot; and would if you gave them a chance.

3321.name: Toucan Tip
3321.description: The branch ends here in an abrupt manner, as if it has been dissolved or slowly rubbed away. Perhaps a big slug had a tasty meal here about twenty years ago. At any rate, the branch ends here and the scenic view is magnificent. To the northwest, the ocean lies out before you with azure blues and is dotted with islands of sierra yellows and forest greens. The eastern community of Hedros, with its black smoke and dark buildings, sits like a cancer on the mountain side. Oldgate can be seen to the southeast, and its decrepit form calls out for civic planning. The grasslands of the north roll with perfect rhythm and are bordered by the majestic snowcapped mountains. Looking down, however, the city of Mareldja looks oddly small. You must be at least a thousand feet up. No wonder there's nothing left of the lovers when they leap!

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Toucan
npcs.description: The toucan you are looking at looks right back at you.  The toucan is a rare, long-beaked, tropical bird.  They are large and could snap your fingers off in one shot; and would if you gave them a chance.

3322.name: Python Bend
3322.description: The Bungchu leaves give way to the Jujin vine in this area of the tree. The interplay of the vines makes it difficult to move about on this branch. The odd vines twist and turn in the soft breeze and the smell of fresh bananas wafts up from below.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Python
npcs.description: This python is a BIG snake. I mean really big. So big infact, that pythons have been known to eat animals as large as a small goat!  They are hunted for their skins which fetch a handsome price on the market.

3040.name: Tree Frog Slick
3040.description: This north south branch is covered in moss, ferns, and other tropical plants. There is a slight mist in the air, and the humidity is really getting to you. Here and there you find wide eyed tree frogs clinging to the edge of a leaf or branch, waiting for that tender fly morsel. You hear the sounds of large frogs to the south.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3041.name: Sticky Pad Way
3041.description: The branch here does exactly what it was designed to do; branch out. This T intersection continues to the south and to the east, while to the north it thins out a bit and becomes less misty. Now that you think of it, you are totally drenched with unevaporated perspiration. There are small and large frogs everywhere, and occasionally, you see one the size of a large dog....

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3042.name: Slug Trail
3042.description: The trunk of the tree rises from below you here. Upon it is a large slug trail comming up from the ground and disappearing into the clouds far above you. Perhaps this is the best way down...

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3043.name: Wink Branch
3043.description: This small branch is covered with hundreds of tiny Venus Fly Traps and other carnivorous plants. No wonder there are no flies around the city - these little buggers have a voracious appetites and would surely love to dine on you! I'd count your digits before you leave here...

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3044.name: Hatchery
3044.description: The room seems to vibrate with a rhythmic pulse as you enter. The soft humming of ant legs is all about you, as millions of tiny ants mill about your feet. The room is perfectly smooth and a light golden brown. A soft breeze of hot air wafts about you from the hundreds of small queen ant hatchers whose sole purpose in life is to bring new hatchlings into the world. It would be a bad idea to have a picnic in here, by the way. It is very dry here. (0)

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

1908.name: Ant Storage Room
1908.description: This room has a very low ceiling and you must crawl on your hands and knees to enter it. There are several small piles of strange looking odds-and-ends of bugs, leaves, refuse, and the like. There is a small pile of bones along the west wall, while on the north, there is a large pile of ant body parts. It is very dry here. (0)

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3318.name: Large Branch
3318.description: The large branch you find yourself standing on is partially hidden by an odd mist. The branch continues to the east where you can hear the faint calls of rare tropical birds. Oddly enough, every few minutes you make out the sound of falling water and quiet giggles. Above you, the trunk disappears into the thin white clouds about 200' skyward.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

d.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3324.name: Python Tip
3324.description: This is the Python Tip. And here's a good tip: LEAVE. The pythons here are numerous and cranky. Probably because you are standing on several of them now. The area is filled with them, their excrement, and old dead skins. There are several large piles of snakeskins about this branch.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Monty
npcs.description: Monty is the father of this python clan.  He's big, beautiful, and not very nice.  As he grins at you, in his own little reptilian way, you can see his HUGE fangs.  Infact, they look rather sharp and poisonous.

3325.name: Along a Huge Branch
3325.description: This huge branch pulls out from the thick tropical areas of the tree from the south and heads north into a more arid climate. The branch, to the north, looks a bit crumbly and rotten, while to the south it is obscured by foliage. This particular section of the tree has a peaceful feeling to it and there are several branches which even look like comfortable benches. In fact, the whole place looks like the front of some arboreal general store.

n.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

3326.name: Bend in the Branch
3326.description: The branch bends to the east here and rises slowly into the sky. There is an odd rotting smell here and the footing looks to be bit softer than normal. To the south, you see an peaceful looking opening in the foliage.

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

e.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: The Twin Trees - City of Mareldja
